globalNews.title: Two boys rescued from Venezuela earthquake rubble after days of being trapped
globalNews.summary: Rescuers spent six hours carefully digging to reach one of the boys, as many residents continue searching through the rubble by hand, still waiting for heavy machinery to arrive.

globalNews.title: In Caracas, this feels like the hardest moment in Venezuela's modern history
globalNews.summary: Rescue teams are working ceaselessly to reach those trapped under rubble. But as hope fades, anger is growing.

globalNews.title: US and Iran exchange strikes and accuse each other of violating ceasefire
globalNews.summary: Iran says it has launched retaliatory attacks at US infrastructure in Kuwait and Bahrain after the US said it hit multiple targets across Iran.

globalNews.title: Eleven killed after plane carrying skydivers crashes in eastern France
globalNews.summary: The pilot and 10 passengers died in the incident, local officials said.

globalNews.title: Why Kim Jong Un never talks about his mother - or her controversial bloodline
globalNews.summary: Very few North Koreans know about her, as her origin could threaten the regime’s legitimacy.

cryptoNews.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
cryptoNews.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

cryptoNews.title: Binance posts over $400M in weekly net outflows as MiCA deadline nears
cryptoNews.summary: Early exchange flow data show no clear signs of a mass migration from Binance ahead of the EU MiCA transition deadline, despite rivals' efforts to attract users.

cryptoNews.title: Grayscale's Pandl hopes Strategy sells $3B in Bitcoin to restore confidence
cryptoNews.summary: Grayscale's research head Zach Pandl said Strategy should sell $3 billion in Bitcoin to cover its cash obligations, but CryptoQuant argued the company has other ways to support STRC.

cryptoNews.title: Base post-mortem reveals sequencer bug behind back-to-back outages
cryptoNews.summary: A “race condition” after the system was reset prevented the sequencers from catching up, causing the second outage.

cryptoNews.title: Bitcoin unspent transaction outputs signal capitulation underway: analyst
cryptoNews.summary: “These periods have always been profitable for long-term investors,” said CryptoQuant analyst Darkfost.

aiNews.title: SoftBank’s CEO isn’t the only one with questions about Elon Musk’s orbital data center hype
aiNews.summary: Not everyone is buying Elon Musk’s vision for orbital data centers.

aiNews.title: Apple Vision Pro exec is reportedly leaving for OpenAI
aiNews.summary: Paul Meade, the Apple vice president in charge of the Vision Pro headset, is reportedly leaving the company to join OpenAI’s hardware team.

aiNews.title: The fittest founder in the room got cancer. Here’s how he used AI to fight back.
aiNews.summary: When confronted with cancer, Connor Christou fed everything tied tied to his regime — blood results, scan data, wearable output, journal entries — into Claude.

aiNews.title: Asian AI startups launch Mythos-like  models as Anthropic’s export ban drags on
aiNews.summary: New models are launching in Asia that promise Mythos-like capabilities without fear of an export ban. U.S. AI labs may never recover this enormous market.

aiNews.title: Trump Admin releases Anthropic Mythos to be used by more than 100 US companies, agencies
aiNews.summary: Over 100 companies and government agencies are reportedly authorized to use Mythos 5, including their non-American employees.
